name: Brave Browser

pricing.details: Free. Optional Brave Rewards (BAT token) system is opt-in and unrelated to browsing privacy.

description: Chromium-based browser with built-in ad/tracker blocking, fingerprint randomization, and optional Tor-routed private windows. Strong privacy defaults without requiring additional configuration.
rationale: Brave provides meaningful privacy improvements over Chrome with no configuration required. Built-in content blocking, fingerprint randomization, and optional Tor routing are above average for a mainstream browser. Based on Chromium, so benefits from Google's security investment. The BAT advertising system is opt-in and does not compromise browsing privacy when disabled. Historical controversies around affiliate link injection have been resolved.
